config.arch_notes: MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60 to reduce overfitting.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features). MAX_EPOCHS=200 for longer cosine schedule.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Label smoothing=0.1.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Class-weighted CE [1,1,1,2,2] for MINF+RV.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Plain CE. Augmentation: H+V+D flip + intensity jitter + gaussian noise.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (7 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Plain CE. H+V flips. Derived features: BMI=W/H^2, SV=EDV-ESV.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (7 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Plain CE. H+V flips. Derived features: BMI+SV. LR=1e-3.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Plain CE. H+V flips. LR=5e-4. Wider MRI encoder: 1→32→64→128→256. ClinicalEncoder→256. Fusion: concat(256+256)→Linear(512,5).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=MAX_EPOCHS. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.1. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (7 features). MAX_EPOCHS=60. Plain CE. H+V flips. LR=5e-4. Wider MRI encoder: 1→32→64→128→256. ClinicalEncoder(7→64→256). Fusion: concat(256+256)→Linear(512,5). Derived: BMI+SV.
